name: Chicken
label: Chicken
definition: The common domestic fowl, Gallus gallus.

name: Frog
label: Frog
definition: An amphibian in the order Anura, which includes the toads. The commonest frog genera are Rana (grass frogs) and Hyla (tree frogs).

name: Zebrafish
label: Zebrafish
definition: Brachydanio rerio, species of small freshwater aquarium fish with a transparent embryo making it possible to follow progeny of single cells until quite late stages of development. This, together with the availability of mutant lines make it an important preparation for the study of vertebrate cell lineage and developmental biology.

name: Mouse
label: Mouse
definition: Any of numerous species of small rodents belonging to the genus Mus and various related genera of the family Muridae.

name: Rat
label: Rat
definition: Any of numerous species of rodents belonging to the genus Rattus and/or various related genera of the family Muridae.

name: Cat
label: Cat
definition: The domesticated feline mammal, Felis catus, which is kept as a house pet.
